message:
fix(abi): remove signal_runtime_ready() calls to prevent membrane deadlocks

The membrane's ValidationPipeline is not re-entrant. When enabled via
signal_runtime_ready(), interposed string/memory functions (memmove,
strlen, memset) that are called from within the pipeline's own internal
operations (PageOracle::insert, RuntimeMathKernel::note_check_order_outcome)
deadlock on the pipeline's RwLock/Mutex.

This is the third time this fix has been applied — parallel agents keep
re-adding the calls. The membrane must remain in passthrough mode under
LD_PRELOAD until the re-entrancy issue is architecturally resolved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
